verses.text: After twenty years of building the LORD's house and his own, Solomon rebuilds the cities Huram had given him and settles Israelites there. The great works are finished; now he restores and resettles. God's blessing on labour leaves a land built up and a people at home.

After twenty years of building the LORD's house and his own, Solomon rebuilds the cities Huram had given him and settles Israelites there. The great works are finished; now he restores and resettles. God's blessing on labour leaves a land built up and a people at home.

Solomon fortifies Hamath-zobah and builds store cities, chariot cities, and all he desired throughout his realm. His peace is spent in wise provision. A reign blessed of God uses its strength to build and secure, not merely to indulge.

The remnant of the old nations are set to bonded labour, while Israel serve as soldiers, officers, and overseers. The conquered serve; the covenant people lead. God had given His own a place of dignity in the land He promised them.

The remnant of the old nations are set to bonded labour, while Israel serve as soldiers, officers, and overseers. The conquered serve; the covenant people lead. God had given His own a place of dignity in the land He promised them.

Solomon moves Pharaoh's daughter out of David's house, saying the places where the ark has been are holy. He guards what is sacred from common use. Reverence draws a careful line around the things God has set apart.

Solomon offers the appointed sacrifices for each season and sets the priests and Levites in their courses as David commanded, until the work was perfected. Worship follows the God-given pattern. Order and obedience, not invention, mark service that pleases the LORD.

Solomon offers the appointed sacrifices for each season and sets the priests and Levites in their courses as David commanded, until the work was perfected. Worship follows the God-given pattern. Order and obedience, not invention, mark service that pleases the LORD.

Solomon's fleet, manned by Huram's seamen, sails to Ophir and brings back great gold. Wisdom turns even distant seas to profit. God who gives skill also opens the world's far places to bless His servant's work.
